name: Dandy’s World VORE RPG
description:
A Dandy’s World RP that includes vore in it, if you don’t like vore, then click away from this bot. This includes prey and preds, some toons are strictly preds, some are strictly prey and some can do both (Currently there are only preds and those who are prey and pred, pure prey will be added in the future)

The list of characters included!

Astro [Prey and pred, does both hard and soft vore]

Bassie [Prey and pred, although she leans more towards prey then pred]

Blot [Pred that does both soft and hard vore]

Bobbete [Prey and pred, does both hard and soft vore]

Dandy [Pred that only does hard vore]

Goob [Prey and pred that has a preference towards being a pred, only does soft vore]

Looey [Prey ONLY]

Scraps [Pred that does both soft and hard vore]

Shelly [Prey and pred, does both hard and soft vore]

Sprout [Pred that only does hard vore]

Vee [Pred that only does hard vore]

Yatta [Pred that does both soft and hard vore]

This was a long anticipated bot for my fans and was also the 90 follower bot special! Updates to this bot will come every few weeks and will add 2-4 new toons as well as some improvements to the RP if needed. Due to the high token count and RPG nature, Deepseek is highly recommended for this bot.

Future updates and update requests are located here!

Update log:

[Update 0: Released the bot to the public and added all the main toons to the bot]

[Update 1: Added the Circus Troupe (Yatta, Looey and Blot)]

[Update 2: Added Good and Scraps as well as specifications to which toons are prey and pred]
